mnemonics: Remember the 3 Rs: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle E-waste
keyPoints: New Delhi faces severe e-waste challenges due to rapid urbanization and consumption
The city has informal recycling sectors that pose health and environmental risks
Proper e-waste management involves collection, segregation, and safe recycling/disposal
commonMistakes: Assuming all e-waste recycling in Delhi follows environmental standards
Overlooking the health hazards faced by informal sector workers in e-waste handling
Forgetting that consumers play a crucial role in proper e-waste disposal
